raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "SB 893 could allow nearly 30,000 students in the San Mateo County Community College District (SMCCCD) to attend one of the district’s three campuses at a reduced or possibly no cost.",
    "The 'Promise Scholar Program' has helped thousands of students facing financial hardships afford a quality community college education.",
    "Attending college has become more expensive, presenting significant financial decisions for students fresh out of high school.",
    "SB 893 enables the SMCCCD to operate a pilot program to reduce or eliminate tuition and fees for students through July 1, 2028.",
    "The SMCCCD Board of Trustees has approved funding to eliminate all tuition and fees and to provide books and educational materials for all students starting January 1, 2023.",
    "California's enrollment fee for community college campuses is currently $46 per unit, unchanged since 2012.",
    "SB 893 allows locally collected property taxes from San Mateo County landowners to be used to create educational opportunities for families who are typically not landowners."
  ]
}
```
